## Spec
- [ ] Linked spec: `.agents/specs/active/<file>.md`

## Scope
- [ ] Only allowed files were modified
- [ ] No config / infra / workflow drift

## Quality
- [ ] Lint passes
- [ ] Typecheck passes
- [ ] Tests pass
- [ ] No unnecessary mocks

## Notes
What changed and why?

## Reviewer focus
What should reviewer inspect most carefully?
